title: Australian Crispy Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with crispy ingredients, inspired by Australian flavors.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
2. Cook the crispy bacon for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy.
3. Remove the bacon from the pan and set aside.
4. Add the grilled chicken breast to the pan and cook for 5-6 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
5. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside with the bacon.
6. Add the crispy fried onion to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until crispy.
7. Remove the onion from the pan and set aside with the bacon and chicken.
8. Add the crispy lettuce to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, until wilted.
9. Remove the lettuce from the pan and set aside with the other ingredients.
10. Warm the Australian-style wrap in the pan for 1-2 minutes, until soft and pliable.
11. Assemble the wrap by placing the chicken, bacon, onion, lettuce, and pickles inside.
12. Drizzle the Australian-style tomato sauce over the top and serve immediately.
